elements.text: It is a long weekend, and you are invited to a friend's wedding. When you arrive to the venue you notice that many people have brought a plus one, and you came alone. You realize that you can still enjoy yourself at the wedding and get to know other guests even while being...

elements.name: attending_wedding_alone--social_situations--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
